MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Caroline Hinshaw for Thomas Lucas (Trustee).

Ms. Hinshaw presented oral argument to support her position with regard to Anthony's share/interest being charged for litigation fees. The accounting petition was taken under submission. Ms. Hinshaw is to file a brief citing legal authority as stated in open Court.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #7, REPORT, FEES
Off Calendar Aug-08-2011 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Timothy Benetti for and with Anthony Asaro. Caroline Hinshaw for and with Thomas Lucas.

Counsel presented oral argument to support their positions with regard to distribution to Anthony Asaro, and the issue not being before the Court or having anything to do with the accounting. The matter was taken under submission.

Judge Pro Temp: Sue M. Kaplan. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Payne.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #7, REPORT, FEES
Off Calendar Jul-11-2011 Continued To Aug-08-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Timothy Benetti for and with Anthony Asaro. Caroline Hinshaw for and with Thomas Lucas (Trustee).

Counsel presented oral argument regarding protocol of the Trust not being followed with regard to payment of the drug testing. Discussions were held with regard to Mr. Asaro waiving his privacy rights and consenting to the drug testing facility to send test results directly to Mr. Lucas, and payments not being made to Mr. Asaro for the months of March through July. The matter was continued to August 8, 2011 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Ms. Hinshaw is to file a declaration by August 3, 2011 regarding any information she has for the Court to consider.

Judge Pro Temp: Sue M. Kaplan. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Payne.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #7, REPORT, FEES
Off Calendar Jun-20-2011 Continued To Jul-11-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Timothy Benetti making a special appearance for and with Anthony Asaro. Caroline Hinsahw for Thomas Lucas (Trustee).

Mr. Bennetti stated that he wanted to substitute in for Mr. Asaro and that he will file the Substution of Attorney form. The matter was continued to July 11, 2011 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge Pro Temp: Sue M. Kaplan. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Payne.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #7, REPORT, FEES
Off Calendar Jun-06-2011 Continued To Jun-20-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Caroline Hinshaw for Thomas Lucas. Frank Asaro in Propria Persona. Anthony Asaro in Propria Persona.

The Court stated that Anthony Asaro is currently represented by Counsel, advised Anthony that a Substition of Attorney needed to be filed (form provided) and stated that no written opposition has been filed. Frank and Anthony expressed their concerns about lack of communication between Mr. Lucas and their Attorney, and not receiving monies. The accounting petition was continued to June 20, 2011 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. The Court advised the Parties that objections if any need to be in writing and filed by June 15, 2011, and that courtesy copies need to be delivered to the Examiner and Ms. Hinshaw.

Judge Pro Temp: Sue M. Kaplan. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Payne.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #7, REPORT, FEES
